heroDescription: Restoration, renovation, and maintenance of historic homes in the Middle Tennessee area, with a 17-year track record of quality workmanship and happy customers.
heroImageAlt: Renovated facade of a large two-story home after extensive rot repair on exterior trim and window frames
aboutDescription:
Artisanal Restoration is the one-man company of master carpenter and cabinetmaker Randall Basti, and specializes in the restoration, renovation, and maintenance of historic homes in the Middle Tennessee area.

Randall has been woodworking since high school and has over three decades of professional experience in carpentry and adjacent trades. After a 5-year detour working as a project manager for Bank of America, where he gained valuable experience in management, administration, and business operations, he opened Artisanal Restoration and has spent 18 successful years serving historic homes in the Central New Jersey area.
aboutImageAlt: Hallway and kitchen of a 1910 home in Princeton, NJ, fully restored with custom trim after flood damage
servicesSummary:
Artisanal Restoration specializes in the service of historic homes, handling everything from routine maintenance to full-scale renovations. We recognize and adapt to each home's quirks and history on a case-by-case basis, and our work will always be faithful to the time period and unique character of your home.

See our services page for the full list of services we offer.
servicesImageAlt: A detail image of the finish carpentry on a fineal custom-built for a staircase in a Princeton, NJ home
